text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is the day of Air Groove's debut race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head out early to get to Sapporo Racecourse in
good time, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My apologies—go on ahead of me. There's
something I need to take care of.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I didn't realize you were coming, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, I wanted to come cheer you on. It's your
debut race, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is an Umamusume from the noble
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family is home to the brightest, most
talented Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among their ranks is the lauded stayer Mejiro
McQueen, as well as the powerful Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is no exception—she, too,
shoulders huge expectations from those around
her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And it isn't just me. Everyone who benefits from
all your hard work is here as well... to support
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So... show them your stuff today, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I promise to live up to your
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching from a distance, I can see Air Groove
talking to Mejiro Dober. She must have noticed
her in the stands and gone over to greet her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After their brief exchange, it feels as though Air
Groove's aura takes on a new intensity.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am—but that's something that comes
with the responsibility of being Empress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The weight of expectation and the pressure to
produce results are burdens I must bear for those
who support me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just relax and keep your eyes on me while I'm out
there. Witness the start of the Empress's legacy.
